---
title: "1_download_custom_cube"
author: "Sander Devisscher"
date: "2025-09-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r set parameters}

```

```{r libraries}

```

```{r read species list}

```

```{r extract species list}

```

```{r extract class list}

```

```{r read species query}

```

```{r fill species query}

```

```{r read class query}

```

```{r fill class query}

```

```{r execute species query}

```

```{r execute class query}

```

```{r export species cube}

```

```{r export class cube}

```
